title: Hillary Clinton says Biden's 2024 reelection bid cost Democrats
shortDescription: Hillary Clinton says Joe Biden made a "terrible mistake" by seeking reelection in 2024, arguing another Democrat could have beaten Trump.

title: Wahab advances in special election for Swalwell seat, reports say
shortDescription: Aisha Wahab leads the pack to serve the remainder of former Congressman Eric Swalwell's term, according to early results.

title: Moment: Trump jokes he is 'the boss' at G7
shortDescription: President Donald Trump jokes he is "the boss" at G7 summit in Évian les Bains while pitching Iran deal to global allies.

title: Trump pulls Clayton nomination for spy chief in spat with Democrats
shortDescription: Trump abruptly pulled his nominee for the country's spy chief, Jay Clayton, and accused Democrats of reneging on renewing a key surveillance law.

title: Who could replace Eric Swalwell? Latest on California special election
shortDescription: California voters weighed in on a replacement for Eric Swalwell.

title: After a fight over Trump's name on Kennedy Center, judge demands future plans
shortDescription: A federal judge ordered Trump to provide his plans for keeping the Kennedy Center open beyond July 5, after removing his name from the facade.

title: Alabama election results: Latest on runoffs for House, Senate
shortDescription: Here's what to know about key runoff elections in Alabama.

title: DC mayor election results: Latest on race to replace Muriel Bowser
shortDescription: Here's the latest on the race for Washington, DC, mayor.

title: Trump says Iran 'too expensive' to bomb at G7 press conference. Live
shortDescription: Details about U.S. agreement with Iran, which has not been released, are sparse. President Donald Trump is expected to share it at a news conference.

title: Georgia election results: Latest on runoff races for House, Senate, governor
shortDescription: Three runoffs in the Peach State highlight a busy primary month.

title: Oklahoma election results: Latest on races for House, Senate, governor
shortDescription: Oklahoma primary day featured races for House, Senate and the governor's office.

title: Petition to rename road Trump Tower is on after Obama at 22k signatures
shortDescription: A tower in Chicago's town spells 'TRUMP' in big letters. A petition wants to change the road it's on to "Obama Ave." Is it possible?

title: A hurdle for Trump, a loss for wage hikes: Takeaways from elections in GA, OK
shortDescription: Voters across four states and Washington, D.C. flocked to the polls as the president's outsized role weighed heavily in various contests.

title: Who won the GA Republican Senate runoff? Trump-back candidate on top
shortDescription: Rep. Mike Collins defeated former college football coach Derek Dooley in the Republican Senate runoff in Georgia. Now eyes turn to November.

title: DOJ reveals alleged White House plot images
shortDescription: DOJ shares images of suspects accused in alleged UFC White House drone explosives plot tied to anti-government conspiracy theories.

title: Congress, out of the loop in Trump's Iran talks, wants vote on deal
shortDescription: "If it's a secret deal, then how can I take it seriously?" Sen. Thom Tillis, R-North Carolina, said.

title: 'Not a personal sandbox.' Trump's Garden of American Heroes faces suit
shortDescription: The lawsuit is the latest among a spate of litigation opposing several construction projects undertaken by the president.

title: Trump wants grass greener on his side of fence after UFC event
shortDescription: The White House is getting new sod and seeding to restore the South Lawn after the UFC Freedom 250 event.

title: Split decision for Trump-backed candidates in Georgia
shortDescription: Rep. Mike Collins won the GOP nomination for Senate in Georgia, but Rick Jackson defeated Lt. Gov. Burt Jones in the Republican gubernatorial race.

title: Trump news today, June 16. It's primary Election Day in these states
shortDescription: President Donald Trump is still in France for the G7 Summit. At home, it's primary Election Day in these states. Plus, the latest on Iran.

title: Trump's ballroom price tag soars to $600 million, according to report
shortDescription: President Donald Trump's ballroom is projected to cost $600 million, significantly more than the he's said, according to a Washington Post report.
